summary: Classified the five seed PRs from the live inventory shard independently. No shared canonical was selected. Security preflight reported no security-sensitive seed refs. The job disables instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and raise_pr, so the result preserves open contributor PRs and routes only the specific maintainer-review decisions that remain unresolved.

actions.reason: Focused, high-risk contributor fix linked to open issue #85366; merge/fix are disallowed and the conflict/technical correctness decision is maintainer-scoped.
Green, focused tooling PR with maintainer-review and rebase/update signal; not eligible for close or merge in this inventory job.
Keep open as an independent PR awaiting proof or maintainer follow-up; close and fix paths are not allowed and no safe close classification is supported.
Keep open as an independent docs/provider PR; low-signal close is disabled and proof remains unresolved.
Product/prompt-behavior decision linked to open issue #90713; not closable in inventory cleanup and requires maintainer review.

needs_human: #85399: maintainer needs to choose whether and how to proceed with the large session-state/availability fix for #85366 given cross-PR overlap with #86540, #86711, and #87342.
